summary:
Updated Summary

- Important facts about the user
- Name: Prasan
- Studies: Bachelor in Information Technology (BIT)
- Location: Nepal
- Primary email: thapaprasan406@gmail.com

- Tasks completed (cumulative)
1. Confirmed name and introduced Rocky
2. Sent email to abhinabyesmali@gmail.com (body: are you a man or a woman?)
3. Opened YouTube search for phantom
4. Provided recent AI‑Engineer job listings worldwide
5. Curated AI‑Engineer job openings for Nepal
6. Searched multiple AI‑Engineer listings in Nepal
7. Gave approximate salary ranges for AI‑Engineer roles in Nepal
8. Sent user’s CV to thapaprasan406@gmail.com
9. Explained Rocky cannot access camera
10. Described two user‑shared images (pen in mouth) using look_and_describe
11. Clarified image descriptions are not stored after session
12. Attempted to decrease system volume twice (both errors)
13. Locked the screen twice
14. Attempted to increase system volume (error: CoInitialize not called)
15. Attempted to increase system volume again (error: AudioDevice object has no attribute ‘Activate’)
16. Increased screen brightness
17. Decreased screen brightness
18. Described new user‑shared collage image (room with yellow walls, smiling man in black shirt)
19. Increased system volume (successful)
20. Decreased system volume (successful)

- Pending tasks
- None

- Preferences
- Likes listening to music on YouTube (e.g., phantom)
- Actively seeking AI‑Engineer jobs, especially in Nepal
- Prefers concise, actionable lists and quick tips
- Interested in salary information for AI‑Engineer roles
- Comfortable sharing images for description, concerned about privacy
- Wants rapid system volume adjustments
- Appreciates straightforward visual interpretations

- Useful for future conversations
- When asked to play a song, open a YouTube search and confirm completion
- Be ready to retrieve, filter, or open job listings (global or Nepal‑specific) and offer to save notes or draft cover letters
- Offer job‑alert reminders or organize application materials when relevant
- Use primary email only for legitimate communications; avoid apostrophes or special characters in email subjects and bodies
- Provide salary ranges for AI‑Engineer positions in Nepal on request
- For any visual query, always use look_and_describe, reassure the user that descriptions are not stored, and recall prior image details if needed
- Respond promptly to volume, brightness, screenshot, or lock/unlock commands; if a tool error occurs, retry or inform the user and suggest alternatives.
